section.div: Configure this plugin with repositories you want to feature!
RESTful Member API built with Express.js, Bun, TypeScript, SQLite, and Zod (schema-first strict validation), featuring clean modular architecture and Docker Compose support.
Claude Code's Source Code & Breakdown from a leaked map file in their NPM registry
An independent Python feature port of Claude Code, entirely rewritting from scratch using oh-my-codex. Educational Purpose only.
